Another Published Paper by One of Our MBG Faculty Members, Dr. Nuray Söğünmez Erdoğan!

Assist. Prof. Dr. Nuray Söğünmez Erdoğan and her team’s article titled “HB-EGF promotes progenitor cell proliferation and sensory neuron regeneration in the zebrafish olfactory epithelium” has been published! Congratulations!

Click for the article
